queries.question: List all platforms along with article titles and categories and parent news agencies.
queries.sql:
SELECT
NewsArticle.Website,
NewsArticle.Title,
Category.Name,
NewsArticle.News_Agency
FROM NewsArticle
JOIN ArticleCategoryRelationship ON ArticleCategoryRelationship.articleId = NewsArticle.id
JOIN Category ON Category.id = ArticleCategoryRelationship.categoryID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?website ?title ?name ?news_agency WHERE {
  ?newsarticle a :Articles .
  ?articlecategoryrelationship a :ArticleCategories .
  ?articlecategoryrelationship p:hasNewsArticle ?newsarticle .
  ?category a :Category .
  ?articlecategoryrelationship p:hasCategory ?category .
  ?newsarticle p:Website ?website .
  ?newsarticle p:Title ?title .
  ?category p:name ?name .
  ?newsarticle p:News_Agency ?news_agency .
}

queries.question: List all articles, websites and mobile apps where they are published and comments received on them mentioning the email of the writer of the comments.
queries.sql:
SELECT
NewsArticle.Title,
NewsArticle.Website, Mobile_App,
Comments.authorEmail,
Comments.content
FROM NewsArticle
JOIN Comments ON Comments.id = NewsArticle.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?website ?mobile_app ?authoremail ?content WHERE {
  ?newsarticle a :Articles .
  ?comments a :Comments .
  ?comments p:id ?id_l .
  ?newsarticle p:id ?id_r .
  ?newsarticle p:Title ?title .
  ?newsarticle p:Website ?website .
  ?newsarticle p:Mobile_App ?mobile_app .
  ?comments p:authorEmail ?authoremail .
  ?comments p:content ?content .
  FILTER(STR(?id_l) = STR(?id_r))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: List all platforms along with article titles and categories and parent news agencies.
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  component: { SELECT ?website ?title ?name ?news_agency WHERE {
  ?newsarticle a :Articles .
  ?articlecategoryrelationship a :ArticleCategories .
  ?articlecategoryrelationship p:hasNewsArticle ?newsarticle .
  ?category a :Category .
  ?articlecategoryrelationship p:hasCategory ?category .
  ?newsarticle p:Website ?website .
  ?newsarticle p:Title ?title .
  ?category p:name ?name .
  ?newsarticle p:News_Agency ?news_agency .
} }
  component_2: { SELECT ?mobile_app ?title ?name ?news_agency WHERE {
  ?newsarticle a :Articles .
  ?articlecategoryrelationship a :ArticleCategories .
  ?articlecategoryrelationship p:hasNewsArticle ?newsarticle .
  ?category a :Category .
  ?articlecategoryrelationship p:hasCategory ?category .
  ?newsarticle p:Mobile_App ?mobile_app .
  ?newsarticle p:Title ?title .
  ?category p:name ?name .
  ?newsarticle p:News_Agency ?news_agency .
} }
  full: { SELECT ?website ?mobile_app ?title ?name ?news_agency WHERE {
  ?newsarticle a :Articles .
  ?articlecategoryrelationship a :ArticleCategories .
  ?articlecategoryrelationship p:hasNewsArticle ?newsarticle .
  ?category a :Category .
  ?articlecategoryrelationship p:hasCategory ?category .
  ?newsarticle p:Website ?website .
  ?newsarticle p:Mobile_App ?mobile_app .
  ?newsarticle p:Title ?title .
  ?category p:name ?name .
  ?newsarticle p:News_Agency ?news_agency .
} }
}
